items.title: Spain are World Cup 2026 champions after beating Argentina
items.desc: Shafaq News- New York/ New Jersey Spain are World Cup 2026 champions after defeating 10-man Argentina 1-0 following extra time at New York New Jersey Stadium. Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal in the 109th minute, finishing Nico Williams’ pass to secure Spain’s second world title and end Argentina’s reign.
